name: npm-scripts-demo
description: The JS-native task runner — npm scripts as a Makefile alternative.

scripts.//1: Run with: npm run <name>  (npm test / npm start have shorthands).
scripts.//2: pre/post hooks run automatically around a script of the same name.
scripts.//3: Compose scripts by calling other scripts (the 'target chain').
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.//4: Pass args after -- :  npm run test -- --coverage
